title: Sonic Bumpers - S2 Bumper
description: Bouncing away with custom block names, SFX and subtitles, 1992 style.
body: Another edition of Sonic Bumpers, this time based on the Sonic 2 bumpers! It was a little annoying to fit the bumper sprite from S2 into a 16x square, specially because the red part doesn't have shadows, only highlights.
